_industry_note_guidelines: R185 — Industry note 작성 표준 (사용자 노출 텍스트, dev memo 금지):
✓ Alloy designations (AISI / DIN / EN / JIS / KS / UNS) 1줄 — 산업 표준명 매핑
✓ Composition family (예: 'high-Cr (~12%) high-C (1.5%) cold-work tool steel')
✓ Critical property (1-2개, qualitative) — 예: 'excellent wear resistance'
✓ Top applications (3-5개) — punching die / aerospace landing gear 등
✓ Commercial brand 명 (선택) — Bohler K110, Uddeholm Sverker 21
✗ Numeric data 중복 (σy / UTS / HRC / HB) — main material data 와 중복, 제거
✗ Dev note (⚠ entry / MatWeb 표기 / R### 정정 / mock / fake-variant) — build script 자동 strip
✗ R### prefix — build script 자동 strip
✗ HT cycle 상세 (1020°C oil Q + 200°C T) — heat treatment 카드와 중복

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS G10180 / DIN 1.0453 / JIS S20C — plain low-carbon steel (C 0.15~0.20%). Cold drawn round bar: σy ≈ 370 MPa, UTS ≈ 440 MPa, HB ≈ 126, El ≈ 15%. Hot-rolled: σy ≈ 220 MPa / El ≈ 25%. Plain carbon → PH/Aging 불가 (R173 fake-variant 제거 완료). 주요: 구조용 볼트, 기계 부품, 일반강 표준.

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — Carbon and Low-Alloy Steels: 1020
ASTM A29 / A29M — Carbon and Alloy Steel Bars

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS G10200 / DIN C22 / JIS S22C — plain low-carbon steel (C 0.18~0.23%). Cold drawn: σy ≈ 350 / UTS 420 / HB 121. Hot rolled: σy 205 / UTS 380 / El 25%. Plain carbon → PH/Aging 불가. Q+T 효과 미미 (low carbon). 가장 흔한 ASTM A29 carbon steel — 기계 부품, 볼트.

R173 — UNS G10450 / JIS S45C / DIN C45 / KS D 3752 — medium-carbon steel (C 0.43~0.50%). Cold drawn: σy 530 / UTS 625. Q+T 가능 — 540°C temper σy 590 / UTS 825 / HB 240. 205°C temper σy 880 / UTS 1180 / HB 305. 한국 표준 S45C 와 동등. 기계 축·기어·임펠러.

ASTM A240 / A276 — Stainless Steel Plate / Bar

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS S30400 / SUS304 / 1.4301 — 가장 흔한 18-8 austenitic stainless. Annealed: σy ≈ 215 / UTS ≈ 505 / El 40% / KIC 150-200 (very tough). max service 870°C intermittent. 425-870°C sensitization 우려 (Cr23C6 입계석출). 식품·의료·건축·반도체 piping 표준. Austenitic → Q+T 불가 (R173 fake-variant 제거). 의도된 variant: Annealed / Aged / SH / Cast.

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — Stainless Steel Type 304L (ELC)

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS S30403 / SUS304L / 1.4307 — 304 의 ELC (C ≤ 0.030%) 변종. Sensitization 회피로 용접 후 PWHT 불필요. σy ≈ 170 / UTS ≈ 485 / El 40% (304 대비 5% 낮은 강도, 더 좋은 weldability). 식품·의약·반도체 super-clean piping (EP polish Ra<0.4) 표준. ⚠ 현재 entry composition 의 C=0.08 은 잘못 (정정값: ≤0.030).

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS S31600 / SUS316 / 1.4401 — 304 + 2~3% Mo. Cl⁻ 환경 내식성 비약 향상 (MoO4²⁻ 가 Cl⁻ 차단). σy ≈ 240 / UTS ≈ 550 / El 50% / KIC 150-200 (handbook). max service 870°C. Marine grade / 해상 platform / 식품·의료·FPSO·반도체 piping. ⚠ 현재 entry σy/UTS 는 304 와 동일값 → handbook 정정 필요 (304 mock 가능성).

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — Stainless Steel Type 316L (ELC)
ASTM F138 — Stainless Steel for Surgical Implants

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS S31603 / SUS316L / 1.4404 — 316 의 ELC (C ≤ 0.030%). Sensitization 회피 + Mo 보유 → 의료 임플란트 (ASTM F138 pacemaker / orthopedic), 반도체 super-clean, FPSO 표준. AM LPBF 의 가장 흔한 stainless. σy ≈ 170 / UTS ≈ 485 / El 40%.

R173 — UNS G41400 / DIN 1.7225 (42CrMo4) / JIS SCM440 / KS SCM440 — Cr-Mo low-alloy steel (C 0.38-0.43, Cr 0.8-1.1, Mo 0.15-0.25). Annealed: σy 415 / UTS 655. Normalized: σy 660 / UTS 1020. Oil-quenched + 540°C temper: σy 1100 / UTS 1230 / HB 363 / KIC ~80. Crank shafts, gears, axles, ASTM A193 B7 bolts. AM LPBF 의 표준 high-strength steel.

R173 — UNS A95052 / EN AW-5052 / AlMg2.5 / DIN 3.3523 — non-heat-treatable Al-Mg alloy (Mg 2.2-2.8%). Tempers: O / H32 / H34 / H36. O temper: σy ≈ 90 / UTS 195. H32: σy 195 / UTS 230 / El 12%. H34: σy 215 / UTS 260. ⚠ Aging/Q+T 불가 (R5xxx non-heat-treatable, R173 fake-variant 제거). 해상·marine·자동차 body 패널·연료 탱크·heat exchanger.

R173 — UNS A96061 / EN AW-6061 / AlMg1SiCu / DIN 3.3211 — heat-treatable Al-Mg-Si alloy. 가장 흔한 구조용 Al. O (anneal): σy 55 / UTS 124 / El 25%. T4 (natural aged): σy 145 / UTS 240. T6 (peak aged 175°C×8h): σy 276 / UTS 310 / El 12% / HB 95. T651 stress-relieved. 항공기 구조·자전거 frame·CNC 가공·heat sink. ⚠ entry 의 Annealed σy ≈ 260 은 handbook (55 MPa) 과 비교 시 잘못 (Strain-hardened 값 mock).

sources.label: ASTM F3318 / ISO/ASTM 52907 — AM Powder Aluminum AlSi10Mg

patches.industry_note: R173 — EN AC-43000 / AlSi10Mg / DIN 3.2381 — AM LPBF 표준 알루미늄 (Si 9-11, Mg 0.2-0.45). Cast equiv A360. As-built: σy 240 / UTS 430 / El 5% (rapid solidification → cell structure). T6 (530°C SHT + 165°C aging): σy 250 / UTS 360 / El 8% (시멘트네트 dissolve, Mg2Si precip). Stress-relieved (260°C/2h): σy 165 / UTS 280 / El 14% (ductility 우선). Anisotropy: Z (vertical build) 이 XY 대비 σy 약 7% 낮음 (열-축 효과). 항공·자동차·heat exchanger·열교환기.

sources.label: AISC Steel Construction Manual — ASTM A36

patches.industry_note: R173 — ASTM A36 / SAE 1018 (~) / DIN S235JR / JIS SS400 / KS SS400 — mild structural carbon steel (C ≤ 0.26, Mn ≤ 1.03). σy 250 MPa min (thickness 8-100 mm), UTS 400-550 MPa (대부분 약 450 MPa), El 23% min (200mm gage), HB 119-159. Plain low-carbon → PH/Q+T 불가 (R173 fake-variant 제거). 건축물 골조·교량·플랜트 구조강·플레이트·각관·H-beam·찬넬. 두께가 두꺼울수록 UTS 더 높음 (실제 plate 분포 평균).

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — Plain carbon steel 1010
ASTM A29 / A29M — Carbon Steel Bars

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS G10100 / SAE 1010 / DIN C10 / JIS S10C — extra-low carbon steel (C 0.08-0.13%). Hot rolled: σy 180 / UTS 325 / El 28%. Cold drawn: σy 305 / UTS 365 / El 20% / HB 105. Plain very-low-carbon → Q+T 효과 거의 없음 (martensite 생성 양 미미). Drawing / forming 강 — 자동차 panel·containers·deep-drawn parts·wire·tube·rivet. Carburizing 으로 표면 경화 가능.

R173 — UNS S30200 / EN 1.4319 / X10CrNi18-8 / JIS SUS302 — general-purpose austenitic stainless (Cr 17-19, Ni 8-10, C ≤ 0.15 — 304 의 high-C 변종). Annealed: σy 215 / UTS 515 / El 40%. Spring temper (CW): σy 1280 / UTS 1480 (피아노선·스프링 와이어 표준). max service 870°C. ⚠ entry 의 Solution annealed σy 234 / UTS 565 는 304 와 동등 — 정상. Austenitic → Q+T 불가 (Ms ≈ -100°C).

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — Tool Steels: D2 cold-work
Böhler-Uddeholm — D2 / K110 Tool Steel Datasheet

patches.industry_note: AISI D2 / DIN 1.2379 / X153CrMoV12 / JIS SKD11 / KS STD11 — high-Cr (~12%) high-C (1.5%) cold-work tool steel. Excellent wear / dimensional stability. Applications: stamping / blanking die (auto body panel), slitter knife, thread-rolling die, cold-header punch, knife blade. Commercial brands: Bohler K110, Uddeholm Sverker 21, Hitachi SLD.

sources.label: ASM Engineered Materials Handbook Vol.1 — Aramid Composites

patches.industry_note:
R173 — AFRP / AFK (Aramid Fiber Reinforced Polymer) — para-aramid polymer (DuPont Kevlar, Teijin Twaron, Honeywell GoldShield). Fiber types:
  • **Kevlar 29** (Twaron Type 1000): σf fiber 2900 MPa, E 70 GPa — ballistic vest, helmet (PASGT/MICH/ACH 표준)
  • **Kevlar 49** (Twaron Type 2200): σf fiber 3000 MPa, E 130 GPa — structural composite (Boeing 787 fuselage radome, F1 monocoque inner layer)
  • **Kevlar 149** (high-modulus): E 180 GPa — premium structural
UD 0°/Epoxy: σf 1100-1400, E 75-90, ρ 1.38 g/cc. Woven: σf 500-600, E 25-30. **Compressive strength 약함** (fiber kink — 200-300 MPa, glass 의 30%) — 항상 epoxy 와 hybrid sandwich (CF + Kevlar 외피). 군용 body armor (NIJ Level IIIA, IV with ceramic), 우주 RCS thruster (Apollo CM heat shield outer), 자전거 puncture-resistant tire belt.

R173 — UHMWPE (Ultra-High Molecular Weight Polyethylene, MW > 3M Da). DSM Dyneema SK75/SK78/SK99, Honeywell Spectra 900/1000/2000. **Gel-spun + ultra-drawn** → 80-90% crystalline (vs HDPE 의 60%) → 가장 strong fiber/weight ratio. σf fiber 3.5-4.0 GPa, E 120-130 GPa, ρ 0.97 g/cc (water 보다 부유). UD 0° / vinyl ester: σf 3700, E 128. Tmax 80-130°C (lower than aramid — Tm 145°C limits). 군용 body armor (Dyneema HB80 ballistic panel — NIJ Level IIIA, 0.45 cal stop), marine high-strength rope (yacht jib sheet, tugboat hawser — steel cable 의 1/8 weight + non-corroding), 자동차 안전 net, ski rope, F1 wheel tether. ⚠ Cl⁻ + UV 약점.

R173 — Aluminum Matrix Composite (MMC) — Al 6061 / 7075 / 2024 + SiC particulate (10-25 vol%). DURALCAN F3S.20S (Al-Si + 20% SiC). σy 380-500 / UTS 450-600 / El 1-5% (brittle increase with SiC) / E 95-120 GPa (Al 의 1.4×). 자동차 brake rotor (Porsche / Audi 일부 모델 — 6061 + 20% SiC, 50% weight reduction vs cast iron), 자전거 frame, F1 piston liner. ⚠ 가공 어려움 — PCD (Diamond) tool 만 가능 (SiC particle → tool wear). 가격 일반 Al 의 5-10×.

R173 — Titanium Matrix Composite — Ti-6Al-4V or Ti Beta-21S + continuous SiC monofilament fiber (Specialty Materials SCS-6, TISICS Sigma SM1140+). UD 0°: σf 1400-1800 / E 200-240 / ρ 3.85-3.9 g/cc (Ti 보다 가벼움). Tmax 600°C continuous (matrix-limited). 우주 jet engine rotor disc (F119/F135 LP turbine bladed-rings BLINGs — F-22 / F-35), 우주 landing gear strut. Cost 매우 비싸 ($5000-10000/kg) — 극한 부품 전용. 가공 매우 어려움 (PCD/CBN tool).

sources.label: Allvac / Coalition Resources B4C-Al ceramic armor

patches.industry_note: R173 — B₄C-Al MMC — sintered B₄C (60-80 vol%) + Al infiltration. ρ 2.5-2.6 g/cc (alumina armor 의 65% — 매우 가벼움). σf 400-500 / E 100-140 GPa. NIJ Level IV ballistic protection (.30-06 AP). 군용 body armor insert (US Army ESAPI, NIJ Level IV 의 가장 advanced — SAPI 의 후속 SAPI Plus), Stryker IBCT 차량 add-on armor, IFV crew armor. B₄C alone 가격 비싸지만 (~$200/kg) Al MMC 으로 가공 + 무게 절감. Korea 풍산 / GenCorp 의 공급.

sources.label: ASM Engineered Materials Handbook Vol.4 — CMC SiC/SiC

patches.industry_note: R173 — SiC/SiC CMC (Ceramic Matrix Composite) — SiC fiber (Hi-Nicalon S, Tyranno SA3) + CVI / PIP / MI matrix densification. σf 350-450 / E 200-250 / KIC 25 (Al₂O₃ 의 5× — fiber bridging) / ρ 2.7-2.9 g/cc. **Tmax 1400°C continuous** (oxidation 우수 with EBC coating Yb-silicate). 가스 터빈 hot section (GE F414 / GE9X — shroud + nozzle + combustor — Pratt & Whitney PW1100G 도 채택), 우주 RS-25 nozzle exit, F1 brake disc (carbon-carbon 후속). 가격 매우 비싸 ($2000-5000/kg) — GE CFM LEAP 처음 commercial 채택.

R173 — Al₂O₃/Al₂O₃ CMC (Oxide-Oxide Ceramic Matrix Composite) — 3M Nextel 610 / 720 alumina fiber + porous alumina-silica matrix (matrix porosity 25-30% — toughening via fiber pull-out). σf 200-250 / E 80-110 / KIC 8 / ρ 2.6-2.8 g/cc. Tmax 1000-1200°C continuous in air (SiC/SiC 와 비교 lower T, but coating 불필요 — inherent oxidation 안정). 산업 가스 터빈 transition piece, 케미컬 burner liner, 자동차 catalytic converter shell (high-T variant), nuclear reactor 부품. 가격 SiC/SiC 의 30-50% — coating-free 가 cost 우월.

sources.label: Hexcel HexWeb Al / Nomex Honeycomb datasheet
ASM Engineered Materials Handbook Vol.1 — Sandwich Structures

patches.industry_note:
R173 — Honeycomb sandwich core variants:
  • **Al 5052 (Hexcel HexWeb CR III)**: ρ 32-130 kg/m³, σc compression 0.5-9 MPa, σs shear 0.4-7 MPa, Tmax 200°C — 항공 floor panel, helicopter blade, 위성 truss.
  • **Nomex (DuPont aramid honeycomb HRH-10)**: ρ 32-144 kg/m³, σc 0.7-12 MPa, Tmax 175°C — 항공 인테리어 (FAR 25.853 flammability — Al 보다 우수), 자동차 noise damping.
  • **Kevlar honeycomb (HRH-49)**: ρ 32-128, Tmax 175°C — 우주 satellite (low CTE + high stiffness/weight)
  • **Carbon honeycomb (HRH-36)**: highest stiffness/weight
Honeycomb 의 cell size 1/8" - 1/4" 표준. Skin (CFRP / Al sheet) 함께 sandwich 구성 → bending stiffness 5-10× boost vs solid.

R173 — SMC (Sheet Molding Compound) — polyester / vinyl ester resin + 25-30% chopped glass fiber (25mm length) + CaCO₃ filler + low-profile additive (LPA). Compression molded (matched die, 150-160°C, 10-50 MPa). σf 80-110, σy 70-90, E 11-15 GPa, ρ 1.85-1.95 g/cc. Tmax 130-180°C HDT. 자동차 body panel (Corvette 외장 panel 표준 — 1960s-current, Porsche 911 GT3, Camaro Z28 hood), 트럭 cabin, 가전 외장, electrical breaker housing. 가격 metal stamping 보다 cheap (cycle time 단축), recycle 어려움.

R173 — Si₃N₄ (Silicon Nitride) — covalent ceramic. 변종:
  • Sintered (SSN, pressureless): σf 600-800 / E 290 / KIC 6.5 / Tmax 1300°C
  • HIP'd (Hot Isostatic Press): σf 800-1000 / E 310-320 / KIC 8 / Tmax 1400°C — 가장 high-Q
  • Reaction-bonded (RBSN): σf 200-300 / E 200 / lower density
  • Sintered Reaction-Bonded (SRBSN): σf 600-800
ρ 3.17-3.25 g/cc. CTE 3.2×10⁻⁶/K (가장 low CTE ceramic — thermal shock 우수, 1000°C ΔT 견딤). 사용: 자동차 turbocharger rotor (Nissan SR20DET), 자동차 valve insert (저 inertia), bearing ball (high-precision SKF/NSK), 의료 임플란트 (hip joint head), 절삭 공구 insert, gas turbine combustor.

R173 — AlN (Aluminum Nitride, wurtzite structure) — high-thermal-conductivity ceramic insulator. ρ 3.26 g/cc, σf 270-350, E 320 GPa, KIC 3, Mohs 7. **Thermal conductivity 170-200 W/m·K** (Al 의 80%, BeO 의 80%, but non-toxic vs BeO 1A carcinogen). Dielectric strength 17 kV/mm, εr 8.5. Tmax 1100°C in air (AlN + O₂ → Al₂O₃ slow), 1500°C+ inert. Power electronics substrate (IGBT/SiC power module — Mitsubishi/Toshiba inverter), LED substrate (high-power), 반도체 sputtering target, 5G ceramic capacitor.

R173 — B₄C (Boron Carbide, rhombohedral B₁₂C₃) — 3rd hardest material (Diamond > c-BN > B₄C). ρ 2.52 g/cc (very light), σf 280-410, E 460 GPa, Mohs 9.3. Tmax 1500°C inert (in air > 600°C → boric oxide). **Highest neutron absorption cross-section / weight** — nuclear reactor control rod (Yongbyon style + Westinghouse AP1000). 군용 ceramic armor (NIJ Level IV — F-15/F-22 pilot seat, M-ATV crew armor — only 2.5 g/cc vs alumina 3.9), abrasive (sand-blast nozzle — Al₂O₃ 보다 wear-resistant). 매우 비싸 ($200-500/kg).

R173 — β-SiAlON (Si₃N₄ + Al₂O₃ + AlN solid solution) — sintering 우수 + Si₃N₄ properties 유지. ρ 3.20-3.30 g/cc, σf 650-900, E 280-300, KIC 5-7. Tmax 1400°C continuous in air (Si₃N₄ 와 비슷 oxidation 저항). 가공 cost Si₃N₄ 보다 낮음 (lower sintering T). 절삭 공구 insert (gray cast iron 가공 표준 — Si₃N₄/SiAlON tool 가 carbide 대비 4× life), 자동차 valve seat, molten Al 처리 furnace 부품, glass forming.

R173 — Single-crystal α-Al₂O₃ (Sapphire — same as ruby/sapphire gem). Czochralski / Kyropoulos / EFG (Edge-defined Film-fed Growth — Saint-Gobain) 가공. ρ 3.98 g/cc, σf 400-1000 (orientation-dependent), E 345-435 GPa (a-axis 345, c-axis 435), KIC 2.4, Mohs 9 (diamond 다음). Tmax 1800°C continuous (Al₂O₃ Tm 2050°C). Optical transmission 200-5500 nm (UV-mid IR). LED substrate (GaN epitaxy), Apple Watch / iPhone camera lens cover, 의료 endoscope window, 군용 IR-transparent dome (UV-IR 광학 missile), 시계 dial cover (Rolex DateJust).

R173 — Synthetic Diamond — CVD (Chemical Vapor Deposition, e.g. Element Six MWPECVD) or HPHT (High-Pressure High-Temperature, GE / De Beers). Cubic (sp³). ρ 3.52 g/cc, σf 1000-3000 (orientation dep.), E 1050 GPa (highest of any material), KIC 4-7, Mohs 10. Tmax 700-800°C in air (graphitization 시작), 1700°C inert. **Thermal conductivity 2200 W/m·K** (Cu 의 5×, highest of any material). Cutting tool (PCD = Polycrystalline Diamond — non-ferrous + composite 가공), 광학 window (CVD diamond — Trident missile IR seeker), 양자 NV center (양자 컴퓨터 qubit), heat spreader (high-power laser diode). $5000-50000/kg (single-crystal).

R173 — c-BN (cubic Boron Nitride, sphalerite structure) — 2nd hardest material (Diamond 다음). ρ 3.48 g/cc, σf 800-1500, E 720 GPa, Mohs 9.9. Tmax 1300°C in air (vs Diamond 700°C — c-BN 우월 for ferrous machining). Sumitomo Sumiboron / Element Six CBN500. Sintered CBN (PCBN) inserts for hardened steel machining (>HRC 50 — Diamond 은 Fe 와 carbon 확산 → 사용 불가). 자동차 transmission gear 가공, 베어링 race 마무리, hard-turning replace grinding. Cost $300-800/insert.

R173 — TiC (Titanium Carbide, NaCl structure) — Tm 3140°C, ρ 4.93 g/cc, σf 260-310, E 450 GPa, KIC 3, HV 28-32 GPa. Tmax 1400°C inert. WC-Co cutting tool 의 alloying (TiC, TaC 추가 → 1500°C wear 보존, Ti(C,N) 코팅 표준). Cermet (TiC + Ni-Mo binder) cutting tool — high-speed steel 가공 표준. TiC-particle reinforced steel (Hardide coating). 우주 ablative heat shield mid-layer.

R173 — TaC (Tantalum Carbide, NaCl structure) — Tm 3880°C (가장 high-Tm carbide 의 하나 — HfC 와 비슷). ρ 14.5 g/cc (dense — W heavy alloy 와 비슷), σf 300-400, E 470 GPa. Tmax 1500°C inert. WC 보다 wear superior — 코팅 표준 (TaC 코팅 ball end mill). TaC + HfC ternary (4:1 ratio) 는 가장 high-Tm 알려진 (4200°C). 우주 hypersonic leading edge (X-43A scramjet inlet), nuclear thermal rocket throat (fuel temperature 2600°C+).

R173 — Y₂O₃ (Yttrium oxide, cubic bixbyite structure) — high-T refractory oxide. Tm 2410°C, ρ 5.03 g/cc, σf 130-200, E 170 GPa, KIC 2. Tmax 2200°C inert. Stabilizer for ZrO₂ (3-8 mol% Y₂O₃ → Y-TZP, YSZ — fuel cell electrolyte), thermal barrier coating (TBC) topcoat (7-8YSZ on jet engine turbine blade), 의료 implant (HA + Y₂O₃ composite), 전자 device (RF coil — superconductor YBCO precursor), 광학 IR window (laser missile dome). Treibacher Industrie / Stanford Materials 의 high-purity 공급.

R173 — HA (Hydroxyapatite, Ca₁₀(PO₄)₆(OH)₂, hexagonal P6₃/m) — bone main mineral component (인체 뼈의 65% by weight). Tm 1670°C (decomposes), ρ 3.16 g/cc, σf 80-120, E 80-120 GPa (bone E 18-25 와 비슷). Tmax 1200°C. **Bioactive** — direct bone bonding (osseointegration) — coating on Ti implant (porous HA + Ti-6Al-4V hip stem standard for hip arthroplasty). 의료 dental implant, vertebral fusion cage, bone void filler granules. Cement-grade (synthesized) vs sintered ceramic vs bovine-derived.

R173 — Mullite (3Al₂O₃·2SiO₂, orthorhombic Pbnm) — refractory ceramic + low CTE (5.6×10⁻⁶/K — Pyrex 와 비슷). Tm 1850°C, ρ 3.16 g/cc, σf 200-250, E 145 GPa, KIC 2.5. Tmax 1750°C continuous (oxidation 우수). patches.industry_note:
R173 — Nimonic series (Special Metals, originally Henry Wiggin):
  • Nimonic 80A (UNS N07080 / EN 2.4952 / NiCr20TiAl): Ni-19Cr-2.5Ti-1.4Al. Solution + Aged (1080°C + 700°C/16h): σy 620 / UTS 1000 / El 30%. Tmax 815°C
  • Nimonic 90 (UNS N07090 / EN 2.4632 / NiCr20Co18Ti): adds 18% Co for higher temp. σy 800 / UTS 1240 / El 25%. Tmax 815°C
둘 다 1950s 항공 jet engine turbine blade legacy (Rolls-Royce Nene, Bristol Olympus). 현재는 industrial 가스 터빈 + valve seat (자동차 engine exhaust valve standard) 으로 사용. 718 보다 older but well-characterized.

sources.label: DuPont Vespel SP-1 / SP-21 / SP-22 technical guide

patches.industry_note: R173 — DuPont Vespel SP-1 — Pyromellitic-Dianhydride (PMDA) based aromatic polyimide (no machinable PMDA alternative). Pure Vespel = SP-1. Variants: SP-21 (15% graphite), SP-22 (40% graphite), SP-211 (15% graphite + 10% PTFE). Tg ≈ 360-400°C (extremely high), max use 290°C continuous, 480°C short-term (가장 high-T thermoplastic). σy 86 / UTS 86 / El 7-9% / E 3.1 GPa / ρ 1.43 g/cc. 우주 satellite bearing, 반도체 wafer carrier (high-T), 항공 jet engine bushing, 의료 surgical positioning. ⚠ 가격 매우 비싸 ($500-1000/kg) — 가공 후 사용 only (cannot mold).

R173 — PEKK (Polyetherketoneketone) — PAEK family (PEEK + PEKK). PEEK 보다 ether/ketone 비율 다름 (PEEK 60/40, PEKK 50/50) → Tg 162°C (PEEK 143°C) / Tm 305-360°C (T/I ratio 의존). max service 250-260°C continuous (PEEK 와 동등). σy 90-110 / UTS 100-115 / El 25-50% / E 3.8-4.1 GPa / ρ 1.30 g/cc. PEKK-CF (Arkema/Solvay): σy 120-150, E 12-15. **⚠ entry 의 Tmax 90 은 명백한 오류 — handbook 250°C.** 항공 AM SLS (3D Systems VICTREX HT, Stratasys NovaSpire), 의료 임플란트 (FDA approved Oxpekk).

R173 — UNS R05200 (unalloyed Ta) / UNS R05252 (Ta-10W high-strength) / EN 2.4060 — refractory metal (Tm 3017°C, ρ 16.65 g/cc). Excellent corrosion resistance — all acids except HF + fuming H₂SO₄ (matches Pt/glass tier). Annealed: σy 165-205 / UTS 207-345 / El 25%. CW: σy 690 / UTS 760. E 186 GPa. Tmax 1500°C (inert atmosphere, oxidizes in air >300°C). 화학 plant heat exchanger / valve / piping (특히 HCl/H₂SO₄), 의료 임플란트 (radiopaque marker), capacitor (high-K dielectric), 군용 KE armor-piercing penetrator (Ta-10W), 반도체 sputtering target.

R173 — UNS R04295 / Niobium C-103 / Nb-10Hf-1Ti — high-strength refractory alloy (Nb 88 bal, Hf 10, Ti 1, Zr 0.7). Hf+Ti 첨가로 σy 2× boost (pure Nb 대비) + Hf-Nb solid solution oxidation 저항. Annealed: σy 240-310 / UTS 360-415 / El 25%. AM as-built: σy 480 / UTS 574. Tmax 1400-1500°C (silicide coating 도포 시 oxidation 저항). 우주 rocket nozzle / RCS thruster (Atlas V Centaur engine nozzle), satellite thermal radiator, hypersonic leading edge. ⚠ 매우 비싸 ($1000-2000/kg) — 우주만 사용. Plansee, ATI 의 공급.

R173 — UNS A92014 / EN AW-2014 / AlCu4SiMg / DIN 3.1255 — heat-treatable Al-Cu-Si-Mg (Cu 3.9-5.0, Si 0.5-1.2, Mg 0.20-0.80, Mn 0.40-1.2). 2024 의 Si-enhanced 변종 (Si로 forge 가공성 우수). O temper: σy 95 / UTS 185 / El 18%. T6 (peak): σy 415 / UTS 485 / El 13% / HB 135. T651 (stress-relieved): same as T6. 항공 forging frame (B-29 wing forging, Apollo lunar module structure), truck wheel hub, 자전거 hub, 의료 임플란트 fixture. SCC 우려 — 2024 와 동일. Weldability 약함 (Cu segregation).

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.2 — Magnesium AZ91D die-casting alloy
ASTM B94 — Mg Die-Casting Alloy AZ91D

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS M11916 / ASTM AZ91D / MgAl9Zn1 — magnesium die-casting alloy (Al 8.3-9.7, Zn 0.35-1.0, Mn ≥ 0.15, Cu ≤ 0.025). 가장 흔한 cast Mg (high-pressure die casting 표준). As-cast (F temper): σy 150 / UTS 230 / El 3% / HB 63 / ρ 1.81 g/cc. T6 (200°C 16h aged): σy 150 / UTS 240 / El 6%. Tmax 150°C continuous (creep limit). 자동차 transmission case, steering wheel core, oil pan, 노트북 housing, drill case. AZ91D 의 'D' = high-purity (low Fe/Ni/Cu for galvanic corrosion 회피). 가공 시 lubricant flammable — Mg shaving 발화 위험.

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.2 — Aluminum 1100 commercial purity

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS A91100 / EN AW-1100 / Al99.0Cu / DIN 3.0205 — Commercial-Purity (CP) Al 99.0% (vs 1050 의 99.5%). Non-heat-treatable, R173 fake-variant 제거. O temper: σy 35 / UTS 90 / El 35%. H14 (1/4 hard CW): σy 105 / UTS 124 / El 9%. H18 (full hard): σy 152 / UTS 165 / El 5%. IACS 59% (가장 흔한 architectural conductor). 화학 plant tank lining, 식품 contact, decorative trim, household kitchenware (foil, pot). 가공 매우 easy (annealed). ⚠ entry 의 Strain-hardened σy 34 는 unusually low — likely H12 (very lightly worked) 또는 mock O temper. (handbook H14 σy 105).

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.2 — Aluminum 5454 marine grade

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS A95454 / EN AW-5454 / AlMg3Mn — non-heat-treatable Al-Mg-Mn (Mg 2.4-3.0, Mn 0.5-1.0). AA 5083 의 lower-Mg 변종 (3% vs 4.5%) — 약간 낮은 강도, lower SCC 우려. O temper: σy 85 / UTS 215-240 / El 22%. H32 (1/4 hard + stabilized): σy 200 / UTS 270 / El 10%. H34 (1/2 hard): σy 240 / UTS 305. Tmax 65°C continuous (above which sensitization to SCC 시작). 마린 tank truck (highway gasoline tanker — non-spark Al 표준), 조선 hull plate, automotive wheel.

R173 — UNS A96005 / EN AW-6005A / AlSiMg(A) / DIN 3.3210 — heat-treatable Al-Mg-Si extrusion alloy (Mg 0.4-0.7, Si 0.5-0.9, Mn 0.10-0.50). 6063 의 higher-strength 변종 — high-speed extrusion + medium 강도. T6: σy 225 / UTS 270 / El 8% / HB 95. 광범위 architectural extrusion (curtain wall mullion, sliding door rail, KTX 차체 sidewall extrusion 표준), 자전거 frame, ladder, 신소재 trailer roof.

R173 — UNS A97068 / EN AW-7068 / AlZn8MgCu — heat-treatable Al-Zn-Mg-Cu — **가장 강한 wrought aluminum** (Zn 7.3-8.3, Mg 2.2-3.0, Cu 1.6-2.4, Zr 0.05-0.15). 7075 보다 +15% 강도. T6/T6511 (peak): σy 605-640 / UTS 640-680 / El 9% / HB 200. T7 (over-aged, SCC 회피): σy 540 / UTS 605. Tmax 120°C continuous. Cost 7075 의 1.5-2×. 미사일 body, MK19 grenade launcher receiver, sniper 라이플 bolt carrier, 경기용 baseball bat (banned BBCOR — too high COR).

R173 — UNS A92099 / EN AW-2099 / Al-Li 3rd-gen — 3rd-generation aluminum-lithium alloy (Li 1.6-2.0, Cu 2.4-3.0, Zn 0.4-1.0, Mg 0.1-0.5, Zr 0.05-0.12). Arconic 의 Airware brand. T83 (Sol+CW+Aged extrusion peak): σy 470-510 / UTS 520-560 / El 8% / E 78 GPa / ρ 2.63 (CP Al 의 90%). 7075 보다 6% 가벼움 + 10% E 증가 (Li 가 E-modulus 와 SCC 저항 boost). Tmax 175°C. Airbus A350 / A380 lower wing skin (2099 + 2199), A220 cabin floor (replace 7075), 항공기 lower wing inner stringer.

sources.label: GE Aviation Rene 80 (legacy CF6, F404 turbine blade)

patches.industry_note: R173 — Rene 80 — GE Aviation 의 conventional (polycrystalline) cast Ni-base γ' precipitation-hardened superalloy. Composition: Ni bal, Cr 13.7-14.3, Co 9.0-10.0, Mo 3.8-4.4, W 3.7-4.3, Ti 4.7-5.1, Al 2.9-3.3, B/Zr trace. Investment cast + HIP + 2-step age: σy 850-880 / UTS 1050-1100 / El 8-12% / E 210 GPa. Tmax 950°C continuous (γ' solvus 1090°C). γ' (Ni₃(Al,Ti)) 약 50% vol fraction. CF6 (Boeing 747), F404 (F/A-18), F110 (F-16) jet engine HP turbine blade — legacy (1970s-90s). 후속: Rene 142, CMSX-4 (single-crystal). Cast cost ~$200/blade.

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — PM Tool Steels

patches.industry_note: R173 — Crucible CPM 3V (Powder Metallurgy tool steel) — 'high impact' grade (C 0.80, Cr 7.5, V 2.75, Mo 1.3, Mn 0.4, Si 0.9). PM process → fine isotropic carbide distribution (vs ingot cast 의 dendritic) → 매우 high toughness with high wear. Annealed (delivery, HB 230-260): σy 600 / UTS 950. Hardened (1080°C oil Q + 520°C T peak): HRC 58-60, σy 1500 / UTS 1900. Tmax 550°C. 칼 (Bark River, Spyderco knife), 도검, 충격 hammer tool, blanking die for hard sheet, mechanical chiseling tool. 통상 D2/A2 보다 +30% toughness (충격 우수).

sources.label: Markforged Onyx (15% short CF nylon-ABS blend) datasheet

patches.industry_note: R173 — ABS + 15-30% Short Carbon Fiber (FDM filament — Polymaker PolyMax CF, BASF Ultrafuse ABS-CF). σy 50-60 / UTS 55-65 / El 2-4% (CF 첨가 → brittle) / E 5-8 GPa / ρ 1.10-1.15 g/cc. Tg 100°C, max service 80-90°C (unfilled ABS 와 동일 thermal limit). 3D printing (FDM 도면 prototyping high-stiffness — drone frame, jig, fixture). 가공 시 print bed 100°C, 압출 nozzle 260°C, abrasion wear on brass nozzle → hardened steel nozzle 권장.

R173 — PETG + 15-25% Short Carbon Fiber (FDM filament). σy 50-65 / UTS 55-65 / El 3-5% / E 4-6 GPa / ρ 1.27-1.30 g/cc. Tg 80°C, max service 60-70°C (unfilled PETG 와 동일). PETG 의 transparency 손실 (검정색). 가공 시 압출 230°C, bed 70°C. 3D printing (자전거 mount, drone arm, FFF prototyping medium-stiffness). ABS-CF 와 비교 → warping 적고 식음료 contact 가능.

R173 — PET (Polyethylene Terephthalate, semi-crystalline thermoplastic). Tg ≈ 75°C, Tm ≈ 245°C, HDT (1.8 MPa) ≈ 105°C unfilled, max service 100-130°C. Unfilled: σy 60-70 / UTS 60-75 / El 30-70% / E 2.7-3.0 GPa / ρ 1.30-1.35. PET-GF30 (DuPont Rynite 530): σy 158-170 / UTS 170-195 / E 11-12 GPa / ρ 1.55-1.60 — automotive industrial gear (vs PA-GF 의 흡습), 가전 motor housing, electrical connector, sliding window track. 식음료 bottle (PET unfilled, biaxially-oriented), PET-CF30 (high-temp service 130-150°C).

sources.label: ASTM F136 — Ti-6Al-4V ELI for Surgical Implants

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS R56401 / ASTM F136 Grade 23 (ELI = Extra Low Interstitial) — medical implant grade Ti-6Al-4V (O ≤ 0.13, N ≤ 0.05, Fe ≤ 0.25, H ≤ 0.012 — Grade 5 의 절반). Lower interstitial = improved ductility + fracture toughness for cyclic loading. Annealed: σy 790-830 / UTS 860-900 / El 15% (Grade 5 보다 50 MPa 낮은 강도, 더 좋은 toughness). STA: σy 828-1000 / UTS 895-1100. Tmax 350°C continuous. 의료 임플란트 (hip stem, knee femoral, dental, spinal cage, fracture plate) — ASTM F136 표준. AM LPBF for patient-specific 임플란트 (FDA cleared).

R173 — UNS N07818 / ATI Allvac 718Plus — Ni-base superalloy, Inconel 718 의 'modernized' 변종 (Ni 50-55, Cr 17-21, Fe ≤9, Co 8-10, Mo 2.5-3.1, W 0.8-1.4, Nb 5.4-5.8, Al 1.4-1.7, Ti 0.5-1.0). 718 의 γ'' precipitate + γ' precipitate (Co + W 첨가) → service temp 718 의 650°C → 718Plus 의 704°C 까지 상승. STA: σy 1100 / UTS 1380 / El 18%. 항공 jet engine high-pressure turbine disc / shaft / casing. Cost 718 의 1.5×.

R173 — Nylon 6 (PA6, Polycaprolactam) — semi-crystalline thermoplastic. Tg (dry) ≈ 60°C, Tm ≈ 220°C, HDT (1.8 MPa) ≈ 70°C unfilled, max service 110°C. σy 70-85 / UTS 70-95 / El 30-200% / E 2.7-3.3 GPa / ρ 1.13-1.14 g/cc. 흡습률 9-10% (PA66 의 3× — most water-absorbent common polymer) → 강도 30% 감소 (DAM vs RH50%). 가공 쉬움 (Tm 낮음 vs PA66). 자동차 trim, 카펫 섬유, 어망, 의류 fiber, 일반 enclosure. GF30 grade σy 100-145 / E 7-9 (자동차 underhood).

sources.label: Tepex E-glass woven fabric reinforced PA6 (LANXESS)

patches.industry_note:
R173 — PA6 with E-glass fiber reinforcement:
  • PA6-GF15: σy ~70, E 4 GPa
  • PA6-GF30: σy 110 / UTS 130 / E 7 GPa / ρ 1.36 — automotive intake manifold
  • PA6-GF65 (Tepex 102 woven): σy 390 / UTS 397 / E 22 / ρ 1.80 — carbon-fiber-class strength, automotive crash structure, sports article (golf shaft replacement)
흡습률 GF 첨가로 7-9% → 5-6% 감소. Tmax 130-175°C (HDT improvement from PA6 의 70°C).

R173 — Nylon 11 (PA11, Polyundecanamide) — castor oil bio-based (Arkema Rilsan, ALM PA850, EOS PA1101). Tm ≈ 188°C, Tg ≈ 46°C, max service 95-100°C continuous. σy 45-50 / UTS 45-55 / El 200-330% (very ductile) / E 1.4-1.7 GPa / ρ 1.01-1.05 g/cc. 흡습률 1.5-2.5% (PA12 와 거의 동등, PA6 의 1/4) — long-term dimensional stability. PA12 의 bio-based 대안. 의료 카테터, 오프쇼어 flexible riser (gas/oil), 자동차 fuel line (PA12 의 bio version), SLS 3D printing (ALM, EOS).

R173 — Polycarbonate grades by molecular weight (MW): 
  • Low MW (Lexan 101R 12 MFR, Makrolon 2407): σy 65 / E 2.4 / Tmax 115°C — injection molding ease, thin-wall
  • Standard MW (Lexan 121R 9 MFR, Makrolon 2858): σy 62-65 / Tmax 115-127°C — general purpose
  • High MW (Lexan EXL 3 MFR, Makrolon 3108): σy 67 / E 2.4 / Tmax 127°C — tough grade, optical, riot shield, bullet-resistant glazing
낮은 MW → easier 가공, lower 강도. 광 투과 90%, refractive index 1.586.

sources.label: Celanese Hostaform POM Copolymer (C9021 etc) datasheet

patches.industry_note:
R173 — POM 두 변종:
  • Homopolymer (Delrin 500): σy 70 / UTS 75 / E 3.1 GPa / ρ 1.42 — 더 강함, more crystallinity, fatigue resistance 우수, but stress crack 위험 in caustic.
  • Copolymer (Hostaform C9021, Celcon M90): σy 63 / UTS 83 / E 2.9 GPa / ρ 1.40 — 약간 lower 강도, but chemical 저항 + thermal 안정성 우수 (Tm 165°C 부터 안정 — homo 의 175°C). 식품 contact / 의료 grade 표준.
둘 다 max service 90°C continuous, 110°C intermittent. 기어, snap-fit, bearing, plumbing valve, 가전 housing.

R173 — Polypropylene + 30% glass fiber. Short fiber (1-2mm) vs Long fiber (10-25mm, LGF = better strength). PP-SGF30: σy 60-80 / UTS 70-95 / E 4-6 GPa / ρ 1.10. PP-LGF30 (STAMAX): σy 80-100 / UTS 90-110 / E 6-8 GPa. HDT (1.8 MPa) 150°C (PP unfilled 의 50°C 대비 boost). 가벼움 (PA-GF 의 80% density) + 화학 저항 + 가격 우수 → 자동차 instrument panel carrier, 자동차 battery tray, washing machine drum housing, 가전 외장. Recyclable (vs thermoset GF composite).

sources.label: Copper Development Association — Red Brass family
ASTM B36 — Brass Plate, Sheet, Strip, Rolled Bar

patches.industry_note:
R173 — Red Brass family (Cu-Zn, lower Zn = redder color, higher corrosion resistance):
  • C21000 (Gilding Metal, 95Cu-5Zn): O σy 80 / UTS 235 / El 45 — coinage (penny core), bullet jacket, decorative
  • C22000 (Commercial Bronze, 90Cu-10Zn): O σy 85 / UTS 255 / El 45 — costume jewelry, marine hardware
  • C23000 (Red Brass, 85Cu-15Zn): O σy 90 / UTS 270 / El 45 — plumbing fitting, heat exchanger tube
Work-hardened (H02 1/4-hard): σy 200-220 / UTS 285-320. Tmax 200°C. 모든 Brass는 stress-corrosion cracking (SCC) 우려 (NH₃ 환경).

sources.label: Copper Development Association — C26000 70/30 cartridge brass

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS C26000 / EN CW505L / CuZn30 — Cartridge Brass 70Cu-30Zn — 가장 흔한 'brass'. Excellent cold workability (deep-drawn cartridge case의 이유). As-supplied: σy 152 / UTS 343 / El 65%. CW (H02): σy 350 / UTS 425. C26800 (Yellow Brass 66Cu-34Zn): O σy 100 / UTS 320 / El 60%, H 1/4: σy 270 / UTS 385. Tmax 200°C. 탄피, 식기, 자동차 radiator core, 악기 (sax/trumpet), 시계 부품. SCC 우려 (NH₃, 해수 + 인장응력).

R173 — UNS C75200 / EN CW410J / CuNi18Zn20 — Nickel Silver (German Silver — Ni 가 silver-white 색을 내지만 실은 Cu base, Ag 없음). O annealed: σy 170 / UTS 400. 1/2H: σy 380 / UTS 510. Full Hard (H08): σy 540 / UTS 650. Tmax 200°C. 전기 contact (spring), 음악 instrument (clarinet/flute key), 식기 (silverware base, plating 표면), 모형 기차 부품. 자체 silver-white 색 — plating 없이도 silver-look.

R173 — Borosilicate Glass (Type I/III, Pyrex 7740 / Schott Duran 8330 / KS B0801). 80% SiO₂ + 13% B₂O₃ + 4% Na₂O + 3% Al₂O₃. CTE 3.3×10⁻⁶/K (soda-lime 9 의 1/3 — thermal shock 우수, 100°C ΔT 견딤). σf 70 (flexural) / E 64 / ρ 2.23 / Tmax 500°C continuous, 800°C short. Refractive 1.474. 실험실 beaker, 화학 reactor, 가정 ovenware (Pyrex 'casserole'), 광학 (BK7 = 광 grade), 약병 (Type I borosilicate 약전 표준).

sources.label: Pilkington — Soda-Lime Float Glass technical data
ASTM C162 — Standard Terminology for Glass

patches.industry_note: R173 — Soda-lime Glass (75% SiO₂ + 15% Na₂O + 10% CaO) — 가장 흔한 glass (90% of all glass 생산). CTE 9×10⁻⁶/K (Pyrex 의 3×, thermal shock 약함). σf 30-100 / E 70 / ρ 2.50 / Tmax 400°C continuous (annealing point 540°C). Refractive 1.520. 창문 / 자동차 windshield (laminated PVB), 식음료 병 / 유리잔, 가정 light bulb glass (한국 인천 OCI). 가공: float process (Pilkington), tempered (열처리 → compressive surface, 3-4× strength), laminated (2 ply + PVB).

R173 — CMSX-4 (Cannon-Muskegon) — 2nd-gen Ni-base single-crystal superalloy. Composition: Ni bal, Cr 6.5, Co 9.0, Mo 0.6, W 6.0, Ta 6.5, Re 3.0, Al 5.6, Ti 1.0, Hf 0.1. 3% Re 가 1st-gen (CMSX-2) 대비 +25°C creep capability. SX cast (directional solidification → grain selector → single crystal). σy 950 / UTS 1100 (RT). At 1000°C creep rupture 100h: ~250 MPa. Tmax 1100°C. CFM56, GE90, GEnx, Trent series HP turbine blade. ~$200/kg + cast cost.

R173 — UNS N07720 (Udimet 720) / N07720Li (720Li, low-interstitial) — γ' precipitation-hardened Ni-base superalloy (Ni bal, Cr 16-17.5, Co 14-15, Mo 2.5-3.5, W 1.0-1.5, Al 2.25-2.75, Ti 4.75-5.25, B 0.025-0.035, Zr 0.025-0.035). Wrought / PM disc. Solution + 2-step age: σy 825-1100 / UTS 1100-1300 / El 12-18%. Tmax 870°C continuous (γ' solvus ~1100°C). 항공기 HP turbine disc (Rolls-Royce Trent 700 disc, F119 P&W F-22), 의료 임플란트 (high-temp). 720Li (low-Cr) 는 fatigue 개선.

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — Resulfurized Carbon Steels (1144)

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS G11440 / SAE 1144 / DIN 1.1241 — resulfurized free-machining medium-carbon steel (C 0.40-0.48, Mn 1.35-1.65, S 0.24-0.33). 'Stressproof' = LaSalle Steel 의 cold-drawn + stress-relieved 변종. Normalized: σy 400 / UTS 650. Cold drawn (TG&P): σy 690 / UTS 830 / HB 200. Q+T 540°C high temper: σy 620 / UTS 760. Q+T 425°C medium temper: σy 760 / UTS 900. 가공 후 dimensional 안정 (low residual stress). 자동차 shaft, gear, 산업 machinery 부품, threaded fastener — wherever machinability 가 critical.

R173 — UNS G87400 / DIN 1.6546 — Ni-Cr-Mo low-alloy steel (C 0.38-0.43, Ni 0.40-0.70, Cr 0.40-0.60, Mo 0.20-0.30). 4140 보다 약간 더 hardenable (Ni 첨가). Q+T 540°C: σy 950 / UTS 1090 / HB 312. Q+T 200°C (peak): σy 1380 / UTS 1620 / HB 460. Tmax 425°C. 항공 gear, shaft, axle (보다 expensive 4340 대안), 농기계 power transmission. 자동차 lower-cost fatigue duty alloy steel.

R173 — UNS C95800 / EN CC333G / CuAl9Ni5Fe4Mn1 — Nickel-Aluminum Bronze (NAB) cast (Cu 79-82, Al 8.5-9.5, Fe 3.5-4.5, Ni 4.0-5.0, Mn 0.8-1.5). 우수한 cavitation erosion 저항 + marine corrosion 저항. As-cast: σy 250 / UTS 590 / El 18% / HB 159. Tmax 250°C. Marine ship propeller (가장 흔한 propeller — 청동 propeller 의 60%+), 해상 pump impeller, valve / seawater piping, oil platform riser hub. Cu base 라 anti-fouling (marine growth resistance).

R173 — ATI VascoMax C-300 (UNS K93120 18Ni-9Co-5Mo-0.7Ti) / C-350 (UNS K93501 18Ni-9Co-3.5Mo-1.6Ti) — Cobalt-strengthened 18Ni maraging. Cobalt 9% 가 standard 250/300 의 7-9% 동등 but with high-Ti for stronger γ' analog precipitate. Solution annealed: σy 970-980 / UTS 1100-1150 / El 12%. Maraged 482°C/6h: C-300 σy 1860 / UTS 2080, C-350 σy 2310 / UTS 2400 (peak strength among maraging). ASTM F75 의 wrought 와 동일 chem (Stellite 21 은 cast version). σy 510 / UTS 730 / El 14% (cast). Tmax 760°C. 우수한 wear (galling/sliding 저항), 고온 oxidation 저항. 의료 임플란트 (cast hip femoral stem, ASTM F75 = Stellite 21), industrial 베어링, hard-facing overlay (welded onto valve seat), engine valve face. 일반 Stellite 6 (Co-28Cr-4W-1.1C) 대비 lower wear but higher impact.

R173 — UNS C18150 / EN CW106C / CuCr1Zr / DIN 2.1293 — precipitation-hardened Cu alloy (Cr 0.5-1.5, Zr 0.03-0.30, Cu bal). 우수한 thermal/electrical conductivity (IACS 80%) + moderate strength. Solution + aged: σy 360 / UTS 450 / El 17% / HV 145. AM LPBF as-built: σy 175 / UTS 235. Aged: σy 200 / UTS 295. Tmax 480°C. Resistance welding electrode tip, EDM electrode, motor rotor bar, fusion reactor (ITER divertor cooling), NASA rocket engine combustion chamber. AM LPBF for rocket nozzle (Ti-CuCrZr brazing 대안).

sources.label: ASM Engineered Materials Handbook Vol.1 — CFRP

patches.industry_note: R173 — CFRP (Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer). Fiber: T300 (PAN, σf 3530 MPa, E 230 GPa) / T700 (4900 / 230) / T800 (5880 / 294) / IM7 (5650 / 276) / M40J (4400 / 377, high-modulus). Matrix: epoxy (가장 흔함, max service 100-180°C), BMI (250°C), cyanate ester (180°C), PEEK (250°C). UD 0° T300/Epoxy: σf 1800 / E 130 / ρ 1.58. Quasi-iso [0/±45/90]s: σf 600 / E 50. 항공기 primary structure (Boeing 787 ≈ 50% CFRP), 미사일 nozzle, F1 monocoque, satellite truss, golf shaft, 자전거 frame. 매우 비싼 ($60-200/kg 부품). FRP-recycling 어려움 (염산 가수분해 또는 pyrolysis).

R173 — Alumina (α-Al₂O₃, corundum) — most common engineering ceramic. Purity 96% (CoorsTek AD-96) vs 99.5% (AD-995) vs 99.9% (AD-998). 99.5%: ρ 3.96 / σf 260 / E 400 / KIC 4.5 / Tmax 1475°C / k 32 W/m·K. 96%: ρ 3.72 / σf 220 / E 300 / Tmax 1500°C — glass-phase 가 high-T 강도 손실 (creep). Mohs 9 (diamond/SiC 다음). Dielectric strength 16-20 kV/mm. Substrate (LED, IC), wear part (cutting tool, ball valve seat), spark plug insulator, refractory furnace liner, ballistic armor (sintered), 의료 임플란트 (hip head).

R173 — SiC (Silicon Carbide, carborundum). 변종: Sintered SiC (Hexoloy, σf 400 / E 410 / ρ 3.13 / Tmax 1600°C) / Reaction-Bonded (RB-SiC, σf 200 / E 380 / ρ 3.05 — Si melt-infiltrated graphite preform) / Chemical-Vapor-Deposited (CVD-SiC, σf 600 / Tmax 1500°C, semicon-grade). Mohs 9.5. Thermal conductivity 매우 우수 (120 W/m·K — Al 에 가까움). Bandgap 3.3 eV — SiC power semicon (Wolfspeed, ROHM, Cree). 화학공정 펌프 seal face (mechanical seal), 정밀 광학 mirror, 우주 telescope (Herschel SiC primary), 일본 신칸센 brake disc, 반도체 wafer carrier.

R173 — Zirconia 변종:
  • Y-TZP (3 mol% Y₂O₃ stabilized tetragonal, Tosoh TZ-3Y-E): σf 1200 / E 200 / ρ 6.05 / KIC 8.0 / Tmax 1000°C (1100°C 이상 → over-aging, t→m transformation = LTD low-temperature degradation). Transformation toughening — 가장 toughest ceramic.
  • Mg-PSZ (partially stabilized): σf 600 / Tmax 1400°C
  • YSZ (8 mol% fully-stabilized cubic): σf 350 / ionic conductivity 우수 → solid electrolyte for SOFC (solid oxide fuel cell), oxygen sensor (lambda probe). Tmax 1500°C
의료 임플란트 (dental crown — Y-TZP 가 99% 의치 시장), wear part, oxygen sensor (자동차 catalytic converter), thermal barrier coating (turbine blade).

sources.label: ASTM B90 / B107 — Mg Sheet / Tube AZ31B

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS M11311 / ASTM AZ31B / MgAl3Zn1 — wrought magnesium (Al 2.5-3.5, Zn 0.6-1.4, Mn ≥ 0.2). O temper: σy 105 / UTS 220 / El 12%. H24 (cold-rolled + part annealed): σy 200 / UTS 260 / El 8%. ρ 1.77 g/cc (Al 의 65%). E 45 GPa (강성 낮음 — 같은 강도 대비 thicker section). 자동차 dashboard/scaffolding (소형 차량 weight 절감), 노트북 magnesium housing, 자전거 frame (low cost), 군용 helmet liner. Tmax 150°C continuous (creep 약점). 가공 시 lubricant flammability — Mg shaving fire 위험.

R173 — HNBR (Hydrogenated Acrylonitrile Butadiene Rubber). NBR (Buna-N) 의 hydrogenation → 잔존 C=C 결합 제거 → 우수한 heat / ozone / oil 저항. σy 22 / UTS 28 / El 200-500% (elastomer — hyperelastic) / Shore A 65-90 / ρ 0.95. Working temp -40 to +150°C continuous (NBR -40 to +100). Oil/Fuel 저항 우수 + saturated rubber 라 sour oil (H₂S/CO₂) 환경에서 NBR/FKM 보다 우수. Oil/gas downhole seal, automotive timing belt cover, 식기세척기 seal, 폐기물처리장 belt. Peroxide-cured grade 가 sulfur-cured 보다 high-T 안정.

R173 — UNS R56400 / ASTM Grade 5 / DIN 3.7165 / GB TC4 / JIS Class 60 / Russian VT6 — 가장 흔한 α+β titanium alloy (Al 5.5-6.75, V 3.5-4.5, Ti bal). Mill annealed (760°C/1h AC): σy 880 / UTS 950 / El 14% / E 113 GPa / ρ 4.43. STA (955°C SHT + 540°C aging): σy 1100 / UTS 1170 / El 10% (peak strength). β-transus 980-1000°C. max service 350°C continuous (α-stabilizer effect), 600°C short. 항공 fastener, jet engine fan/compressor blade, 의료 임플란트 (Ti grade 5 ELI / Gr23 = lower O/Fe — Grade 23 별도 entry), AM LPBF 표준 (EOS Ti64, SLM Ti6Al4V).

R173 — UNS S17400 / EN 1.4542 / X5CrNiCuNb16-4 / AISI 630 / JIS SUS630 / KS STS630 — martensitic precipitation-hardening stainless. Cr 15-17, Ni 3-5, Cu 3-5, Nb 0.15-0.45. Aging conditions: H900 (480°C/1h, peak): σy 1170 / UTS 1310 / El 10% / HRC 40-44. H1025 (550°C/4h, balance): σy 1000 / UTS 1070 / El 12%. H1075 (580°C/4h, ductile): σy 860 / UTS 1000 / El 13%. H1150 (620°C/4h, soft): σy 720 / UTS 930. Tmax 315°C (over-aging 위쪽). 항공 landing gear, oil/gas valve, AM LPBF 표준 (가장 흔한 stainless steel for AM).

R173 — UNS S15500 / EN 1.4545 / XM-12 — 17-4 PH 의 'higher toughness' 변종 (Cr 14-15.5, Ni 3.5-5.5, Cu 2.5-4.5). 17-4 와 동등 강도 (H900 σy 1170 / UTS 1310) 이지만 fine-grained ESR melt 로 transverse ductility / KIC 개선. 항공 critical components (Cessna spar/wing fitting), 의료 instrument, AM LPBF (3D Systems LaserForm 15-5PH).

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — AISI 410 martensitic stainless

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS S41000 / EN 1.4006 / X12Cr13 / JIS SUS410 / KS STS410 — martensitic stainless (Cr 11.5-13.5, C 0.08-0.15). Annealed: σy 275 / UTS 480 / El 25%. Q+T 가능: 980°C oil Q + 540°C T: σy 760 / UTS 970 / El 18% / HRC 30. 200°C T: σy 1000 / UTS 1350 / HRC 41. ⚠ entry 의 'Aged / solution-treated' σy 280 은 사실상 Q+T condition (martensitic 은 strict-PH 가 아님). Tmax 600°C (over-tempering 위쪽). Cutlery, steam turbine blade, valve stem, oil/gas tubing.

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — AISI 430 ferritic stainless

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS S43000 / EN 1.4016 / X6Cr17 / JIS SUS430 — ferritic stainless (Cr 16-18, C ≤ 0.12). Annealed: σy 205 / UTS 450 / El 22% (handbook 표준). ⚠ Aging/Q+T 불가 (single-phase α, no austenite to transform — R173 fake-variant 제거). Cold-worked (H/H2): σy 275-400. Tmax 815°C continuous (oxidation), 870°C intermittent. Automotive trim, kitchen appliance, dishwasher interior, deep-drawing (가공성은 304보다 우수).

sources.label: Böhler-Uddeholm — H13 / Orvar Supreme / W302 datasheet
ASM Handbook Vol.1 — Tool Steels: H13 hot-work

patches.industry_note: R173 — AISI H13 / DIN 1.2344 / X40CrMoV5-1 / JIS SKD61 / KS STD61 — Cr-Mo-V hot-work tool steel (C 0.32-0.45, Cr 4.75-5.5, Mo 1.1-1.75, V 0.8-1.2). Annealed (delivery): σy 600 / UTS 800 / HB 235. Q+T (1020°C oil Q + 600°C T HRC 45): σy 1250 / UTS 1550. (HRC 50 580°C T): σy 1610 / UTS 1940. (HRC 53 540°C T peak): σy 1690 / UTS 2040. Tmax 540°C continuous. 우수한 thermal fatigue 저항 — die casting die, hot extrusion die, hot forging die. AM LPBF 의 표준 hot-work tool steel.

R173 — UNS A97075 / EN AW-7075 / AlZn5.5MgCu / DIN 3.4365 — heat-treatable Al-Zn-Mg-Cu (Zn 5.1-6.1, Mg 2.1-2.9, Cu 1.2-2.0). 가장 강한 일반 Al. O temper: σy 105 / UTS 230 / El 17%. T6 (peak): σy 503 / UTS 572 / El 11% / HB 150. T651 (stress-relieved): same as T6. T73 (over-aged for SCC): σy 435 / UTS 505. Aircraft frame, missile body, mold tooling, sporting goods. ⚠ entry 의 Annealed σy 473 은 T6 mock — 실제 handbook O temper 는 105 MPa. SCC (stress corrosion cracking) 취약.

R173 — UNS A92024 / EN AW-2024 / AlCu4Mg1 / DIN 3.1355 — heat-treatable Al-Cu-Mg (Cu 3.8-4.9, Mg 1.2-1.8). O temper: σy 75 / UTS 185 / El 20%. T3 (cold-worked + naturally aged): σy 345 / UTS 485 / El 18%. T351 (cold-worked stress-relief): same as T3. T81 (artificially aged): σy 450 / UTS 485 / El 6%. Aircraft 항공기 wing/fuselage skin, Alclad 변종 (corrosion-protect). ⚠ entry 의 Annealed σy 305 은 T3 mock — 실제 O temper handbook 값은 75 MPa. SCC 취약 + welding 어려움 (Cu segregation).

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.2 — Aluminum 5083 marine grade
ASTM B928 — Marine Grade Aluminum Sheet 5083

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS A95083 / EN AW-5083 / AlMg4.5Mn0.7 — non-heat-treatable Al-Mg marine grade (Mg 4.0-4.9, Mn 0.4-1.0). 우수한 marine corrosion 저항 (Cl⁻ pitting/SCC 우수). O temper: σy 145 / UTS 290 / El 23%. H321 (CW + stabilized for SCC): σy 215 / UTS 305 / El 16%. H116 (anti-SCC for marine): σy 215 / UTS 305. LNG inner tank (cryogenic toughness 우수, -196°C 사용 가능), shipbuilding hull plate, pressure vessel ASME B&PV Sec.VIII, military bridge. Aging/Q+T 불가 (R5xxx non-heat-treatable, R173 fake-variant 제거). ⚠ entry 의 plain Annealed σy 214 은 H321 mock — 실제 O σy 145.

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — AISI 4340 high-strength Ni-Cr-Mo

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS G43400 / DIN 1.6582 / 34CrNiMo6 / JIS SNCM439 / EN24 — Ni-Cr-Mo high-strength steel (Ni 1.65-2.0, Cr 0.7-0.9, Mo 0.20-0.30, C 0.38-0.43). Annealed: σy 470 / UTS 745 / El 22% / HB 217. Normalized: σy 860 / UTS 1280. Q+T 540°C: σy 1100 / UTS 1240 / HB 367 / KIC ~50. Q+T 260°C (low-T temper): σy 1640 / UTS 1965 / HB 555 (260/280 ksi UTS for landing gear). Aircraft landing gear, propeller shaft, drive shaft, gun barrel. ⚠ entry 의 Annealed σy 968 은 Q+T 540 condition mock — 실제 handbook annealed σy 470.

sources.label: ASM Handbook Vol.1 — AISI 4130 Cr-Mo aerospace

patches.industry_note: R173 — UNS G41300 / DIN 1.7218 / 25CrMo4 / JIS SCM430 / KS SCM430 / EN16 — Cr-Mo low-alloy steel (C 0.28-0.33, Cr 0.8-1.1, Mo 0.15-0.25). Annealed: σy 360 / UTS 560 / El 28% / HB 156. Normalized (870°C AC): σy 435 / UTS 670 / El 25% / HB 197. Q+T 540°C: σy 850 / UTS 945 / HB 285. Q+T 200°C (peak): σy 1430 / UTS 1690. Aircraft tubing (welded tube frame), airframe weldment, motorcycle frame, pressure vessel. 아주 좋은 weldability — GTAW/SMAW (preheat 100°C, PWHT 500°C).

R173 — 18Ni Maraging (Co-Mo-Ti precipitation): 250 (UNS K92890, low Co), 300 (UNS K93120 / DIN 1.2709, AMS 6514), 350 (UNS K93501) — number = 0.2% YS in ksi. Composition: Ni 17-19, Co 7-11, Mo 3-5, Ti 0.2-1.7, C ≤ 0.03. Solution annealed (815°C AC, then air-cool to RT): σy 760 / UTS 1000 / El 17% (soft Fe-Ni martensite, no carbon). Maraged 482°C/3h: 250 σy 1640 / 300 σy 1900 / 350 σy 2400. AM LPBF 의 표준 high-strength steel (EOS MS1 = 300, Markforged Spec 1.2709). 항공·금형·로켓 부품. ⚠ Maraging 은 Carbon-free → Q+T 가 아니라 'mar-aging' 인 special process. C-free 이라 다른 강과 본질적으로 다름.

R173 — UNS R30075 (cast F75) / R31537 (wrought F1537) / ISO 5832-12 — biomedical Co-28Cr-6Mo alloy. Cast (F75): σy 450 / UTS 665 / El 8% / HRC 25-35. Wrought solution annealed: σy 480 / UTS 990 / El 28%. Hot-rolled bar: σy 590 / UTS 1100 / El 20%. Cold-worked (wire): σy 825 / UTS 1240 / El 15%. Tmax 600°C continuous. 가장 흔한 의료 임플란트 (artificial hip head / knee femoral component / dental crown), AM LPBF (EOS Cobalt-Chrome SP2 = ASTM F75). 매우 wear-resistant + 부식 저항.

R173 — UNS N06625 / EN 2.4856 / NiCr22Mo9Nb / Alloy 625 — Ni-base solid-solution-strengthened superalloy (Ni ≥58, Cr 20-23, Mo 8-10, Fe ≤5, Nb+Ta 3.15-4.15). Annealed: σy 415-585 / UTS 760-960 / El 30-55% (handbook 분포). Solution-strengthened (no aging required). 우수한 oxidation 저항 1100°C + chloride pitting/SCC 저항. AM LPBF as-built: σy 644 / UTS 945 / El 37% (microstructure 가 wrought 와 다름). 해수 환경 valve / piping (FPSO topside), aerospace afterburner liner, nuclear reactor 부품, AM LPBF 의 standard nickel superalloy.

sources.label: SABIC CYCOLAC ABS resin technical datasheet
ASM Engineered Materials Handbook Vol.2 — ABS

patches.industry_note: R173 — ABS (Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene) — 사출 성형 표준 폴리머. Tg ≈ 100°C, max use 80-90°C. σy 35-50 / UTS 38-49 / El 15-30% / E 2.0-2.6 GPa / ρ 1.04-1.06 g/cc. Notched Izod 200-450 J/m (impact 우수). 일반 가전, 자동차 인테리어, LEGO 블록, 3D printing FDM 표준 (압출 250°C, 베드 100°C). UV 노출 시 변색 — 외부 사용 시 painted/coated 필요.

sources.label: ASM Engineered Materials Handbook Vol.2 — Polymer Blends

patches.industry_note: R173 — Polycarbonate/ABS alloy (PC 50-70%, ABS 30-50%). PC 의 강성/내열 + ABS 의 가공성·내충격 결합. σy 40-50 / UTS 50-60 / El 20-40% / E 2.4-2.8 GPa / HDT 110-130°C. 자동차 dashboard, 휴대폰 케이스, 의료 housing. UL 94 V-0 grade 가능 (난연).

sources.label: SABIC LEXAN PC resin technical guide

patches.industry_note: R173 — Polycarbonate (Lexan/Makrolon) — 비결정성 투명 thermoplastic. Tg ≈ 145°C, HDT (1.8 MPa) ≈ 130°C. σy 60-70 / UTS 60-72 / El 90-130% / E 2.2-2.4 GPa / ρ 1.20 g/cc. 90%+ 광투과율, refractive index 1.586. Notched Izod 600-900 J/m (가장 강한 thermoplastic 의 하나). 안전 헬멧·방탄·CD/DVD·의료 housing·자동차 헤드램프 렌즈. UV 노출 시 황변 — UV-stabilized grade 필요.

R173 — PMMA (Polymethylmethacrylate, Acrylic, Plexiglas) — 비결정성 투명 thermoplastic. Tg ≈ 105°C. σy 55-77 / UTS 55-80 / El 2-10% (brittle) / E 2.4-3.3 GPa / ρ 1.19 g/cc. 92%+ 광투과율 (PC 보다 우수), 내후성 우수 (UV stable, 황변 안 함). 항공기 canopy (Plexiglas G), 자동차 테일램프, 수족관, 광학 부품, sneeze guard. 깨질 수 있음 → 안전 영역엔 PC. Cast > Injection grade (분자량 및 강성).

R173 — Nylon 12 (Polylauryllactam) — semi-crystalline thermoplastic. Tg ≈ 50°C, Tm ≈ 178°C, HDT (0.46 MPa) ≈ 145°C, **max service 80-100°C continuous** (⚠ entry 의 Tmax 540 은 K 단위 표기 오류로 보임 — 실제 °C 80-100). σy 45-50 / UTS 45-50 / El 200-300% / E 1.5-1.7 GPa / ρ 1.01 g/cc. SLS / MJF 3D printing 의 가장 흔한 폴리머 (EOS PA 2200 = Vestamid L). 의료 카테터, 자동차 fuel line, 케이블 sheath, 화장품 패키지. 흡습률 낮음 (1.5% — PA66 대비 절반).

R173 — Nylon 6/6 (Polyhexamethylene adipamide) — semi-crystalline thermoplastic. Tg (dry) ≈ 70°C, Tm ≈ 265°C, HDT (1.8 MPa) ≈ 90°C, max service 100-120°C. σy 70-85 / UTS 75-95 / El 20-60% / E 2.7-3.5 GPa / ρ 1.13-1.15 g/cc (dry-as-molded). 흡습률 3% → 강도 30% 감소 (DAM vs 50% RH). Notched Izod 50-110 J/m. 자동차 intake manifold, 라디에이터 end tank, gear, fastener, 전기 connector. GF30 grade → σy 150-180, E 8-9 GPa (보강재 사용 표준).

R173 — POM (Polyoxymethylene, Acetal). Homopolymer (Delrin 500) vs Copolymer (Hostaform C). Tm 165-175°C, HDT (1.8 MPa) ≈ 100°C, max service 80-100°C continuous, 100-120°C intermittent. Homo: σy 70 / UTS 75 / El 35% / E 3.2 GPa / Notched Izod 75 J/m. Copo: σy 65 / UTS 70 / El 40% / E 2.7 GPa. 낮은 마찰계수 (μ=0.20), 우수한 wear, 치수 안정성. Gear, bearing, snap-fit, fuel system parts. 흡습률 0.2-0.4% (Nylon 대비 매우 낮음).

R173 — Polypropylene (PP). Homopolymer vs Random Copolymer (RCP) vs Block Copolymer (BCP). Tg ≈ -10°C (cold-brittle), Tm 160-170°C, HDT (0.46 MPa) ≈ 100°C, max service 100-120°C. Homo: σy 33-38 / UTS 35-40 / El 100-600% / E 1.4-1.6 GPa / ρ 0.90 g/cc (가장 가벼운 thermoplastic). 화학 약품 저항 우수 (산/알칼리). 자동차 bumper (BCP), 마이크로파 ware, 식품 용기, 의료 disposable (주사기, IV 백). 저온 충격 약점 → BCP 또는 EPDM 첨가.

sources.label: ASTM F2026 — PEEK Polymers for Surgical Implants

patches.industry_note: R173 — PEEK (Polyetheretherketone) — 반결정성 high-performance thermoplastic. Tg ≈ 143°C, Tm ≈ 343°C, HDT (1.8 MPa) ≈ 152°C unfilled / 315°C GF30, max service 250°C continuous (긴 시간), 310°C short-term. σy 90-100 / UTS 95-115 / El 30-50% / E 3.6-3.8 GPa / ρ 1.30-1.32 g/cc. UL 94 V-0 자체 난연. 항공 (Airbus A350 bracket), 의료 임플란트 (ASTM F2026 spinal cage), 반도체 wafer carrier, 오일/가스 seal. 가공 어려움 (cutter 마모) → GF30 / CF30 보강 standard.

R173 — PETG (Polyethylene Terephthalate Glycol-modified) — 비결정성 (cyclohexanedimethanol modifier 로 결정화 방지) 투명 thermoplastic. Tg ≈ 80°C, max service 60-70°C. σy 45-55 / UTS 50-55 / El 40-100% / E 2.0-2.3 GPa / ρ 1.27 g/cc. PMMA 대비 내충격 우수, PC 대비 가공 쉬움. 3D printing FDM 의 가장 흔한 transparent filament (압출 230°C, 베드 70°C). 의료 패키지 (γ-sterilizable), 음료 병, 식품 디스플레이, 진공 성형.

R173 — PLA (Polylactic Acid) — bio-based, biodegradable, semi-crystalline thermoplastic. Tg ≈ 60°C, Tm ≈ 175°C, HDT (0.46 MPa) ≈ 55-65°C unannealed (annealing 으로 100°C 가능), max service 50-55°C. σy 50-65 / UTS 50-70 / El 2-6% (brittle) / E 2.7-3.5 GPa / ρ 1.24 g/cc. ⚠ entry 의 σy 63 / UTS 68 은 handbook 범위 약간 상한 — 정상. 3D printing FDM 의 가장 흔한 filament (압출 200°C, 베드 60°C) — 낮은 휘발성·warping 적음. 식품 패키지, 의료 봉합사, 화장품 캡슐.

sources.label: ASTM D1784 — Rigid PVC Compounds and CPVC

patches.industry_note: R173 — PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride). Rigid (uPVC, ASTM D1784 Class 12454-B / Type I) — 가장 흔한 grade. Tg ≈ 85°C, max service 60-70°C. σy 40-55 / UTS 50-60 / El 40-80% / E 2.7-3.3 GPa / ρ 1.38-1.42 g/cc. 자체 난연 (chlorine 함유, UL 94 V-0). 자체 화학 저항 우수. 배관 (PVC pipe — 1억 톤/년 시장), 윈도우 프레임, 의료 IV bag (plasticized), 전기 절연 wire jacket. 가공 시 thermal degradation 발생 → 안정제 (Sn, Ca-Zn) 필수.

sources.label: Corning HPFS Fused Silica technical guide

patches.industry_note: R173 — Fused Silica (amorphous SiO₂, 99.99%+) — synthetic vitreous silica. ρ 2.20 g/cc (crystalline quartz 의 83%), Tg ≈ 1100°C (softening point), Tm ≈ 1700°C, max use 1100°C continuous / 1300°C short. σf (flexure) 50-110 MPa (brittle, no yielding), E 73 GPa, KIC ~0.8, hardness ~600 HK. CTE 0.55×10⁻⁶/K — 거의 zero. 광투과 200-2500nm (UV-IR), index 1.4585. UV optics, 반도체 wafer carrier (high-purity), 광섬유 preform, telescope mirror (ULE), 정밀 thermal mass. Knife edge 충격 매우 약함.

R173 — Macor (Corning, fluorophlogopite mica + borosilicate glass matrix). ρ 2.52 g/cc, max service 800°C continuous / 1000°C short-term, no softening below 800°C. σf 94 MPa (flexure), E 64 GPa, KIC 1.5, CTE 9.3×10⁻⁶/K (matches metals — joinable with metal seals). 일반 cutter 로 가공 가능 — 굳어지지 않은 상태 ceramic 의 유일한 옵션. Dielectric strength 40 kV/mm, εr 6.0. 진공 챔버 fixture, semicon ALD wafer support, MRI coil mount, 광학 mounting hardware. Brittle — impact 약함.

R173 — α-Quartz (trigonal, P3₂21, single-crystal SiO₂) — natural form (Brazil) 또는 hydrothermally grown (Sawyer, Toyo). ρ 2.65 g/cc, **α→β transition 573°C** (Tmax 자료의 의미 — 이 온도 위에서 더 이상 piezoelectric 안 됨), Tm 1670°C (β-cristobalite 형태). σf 50 MPa, E 95 GPa (anisotropic: a-axis 87, c-axis 105), CTE 14.0×10⁻⁶/K (PE direction anisotropy). 압전 (piezoelectric) d11 = 2.3 pC/N → watch oscillator, MEMS, BAW filter. 광학 (UV 투과 200nm까지), 반도체 wafer fab. Cleaning grade 99.999%.

patches.industry_note: R173 — GFRP (Glass Fiber Reinforced Polymer). E-glass (가장 흔함, 저렴, σf fiber 3.4 GPa) / S-2 glass (고강도, σf fiber 4.9 GPa, 30% 강성↑). Matrix: epoxy (가장 흔함, max service 100-150°C) / polyester (저가 marine) / vinyl ester / phenolic (난연). UD 0° 시: E-glass/epoxy σf 1100 / E 42 GPa / ρ 2.0, S-2 glass/epoxy σf 1700 / E 60 / ρ 2.0. 동일 방향 인장은 fiber dominated (rule of mixtures), 횡방향/전단은 matrix dominated. Wind turbine blade, boat hull, automotive panel, sporting goods, FRP rebar.

R173 — UNS N07718 / EN 2.4668 / AMS 5662 / GH4169 / NC19FeNb — Ni-base γ'' precipitation-hardened superalloy (Ni 50-55, Cr 17-21, Fe bal, Nb 4.75-5.5, Mo 2.8-3.3, Ti 0.65-1.15, Al 0.2-0.8). Standard STA cycle: SHT 980°C/1h AC + age 720°C/8h FC to 620°C/8h. STA: σy 1100-1180 / UTS 1280-1310 / El 12-18%. Service temp 650°C (γ'' decomposes >680°C). AM LPBF 의 가장 흔한 superalloy — turbine disks, combustor liners, rocket engine thrust chambers, oil/gas wellhead. AM as-built σy 650 / UTS 980 → STA 후 wrought 와 동등 강도.
